allow: PowerShell(python -c "import requests; print\('requests:', requests.__version__\)" 2>&1; python -c "import bs4; print\('bs4:', bs4.__version__\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem Env: | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "proxy|PROXY" } | Format-Table Name, Value)

PowerShell(python -c "import requests; print\('requests:', requests.__version__\)" 2>&1; python -c "import bs4; print\('bs4:', bs4.__version__\)" 2>&1; python -c "import feedparser; print\('feedparser:', feedparser.__version__\)" 2>&1; python -c "import lxml; print\('lxml:', lxml.__version__\)" 2>&1)
